SEARCH
Package com.example.helios.model

Class NotificationRecord

java.lang.Object
com.example.helios.model.NotificationRecord
public class NotificationRecord extends Object
Represents a notification record in the Helios application. Stores information about a notification sent to a user or a group of users.

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    NotificationRecord()
    Default constructor required for Firestore deserialization.
    NotificationRecord(String notificationId, String eventId, String senderUid, String recipientUid, NotificationAudience audience, String title, String message, long sentAtMillis)
    Constructs a new NotificationRecord with the specified details.

  • Constructor Details

    • NotificationRecord

      public NotificationRecord()
      Default constructor required for Firestore deserialization.

    • NotificationRecord

      public NotificationRecord(String notificationId, String eventId, String senderUid, String recipientUid, NotificationAudience audience, String title, String message, long sentAtMillis)
      Constructs a new NotificationRecord with the specified details.
      Parameters:
      notificationId - Unique identifier for the notification.
      eventId - Optional UID of the event related to the notification.
      senderUid - UID of the user who sent the notification.
      recipientUid - UID of the user who received the notification (if applicable).
      audience - The target audience for the notification.
      title - The title of the notification.
      message - The body content of the notification.
      sentAtMillis - Time when the notification was sent in epoch milliseconds.
